curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Patch commit d708ed5 fixes read_varint overflow by changing Py_ssize_t (signed, platform-dependent) types to unsigned long long in both read_varint and write_varint functions in varint.pyx. The .c file is auto-generated from the .pyx Cython source. Only 2 non-test source files changed (varint.pyx and its generated varint.c), so the patch is not noisy. Locations derived directly from the patch diff targeting the two functions modified. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per new guidelines, narrowing to the LEB128 varint encoding/decoding subsystem.
